description: Velociraptor DFIR Business Metrics — Fleet coverage, IR readiness, operational efficiency, security posture, compliance, and risk scoring for CISO/executive reporting.

panels.title: Fleet Coverage (Connected Now)
panels.description: Currently connected clients as % of asset inventory. For 7-day active counts, use Server.Monitor.Health VQL artifact (not available via Prometheus). Requires $asset_count variable.

panels.title: WebSocket Adoption
panels.description: Percentage of connected clients using WebSocket transport (preferred modern transport).

panels.title: Concurrency Utilization
panels.description: Current concurrent client operations as gauge — high values approaching frontend.concurrency limit indicate saturation

panels.title: Reachable Now
panels.description: Endpoints with active connections right now — IR response capacity

panels.title: Collection Speed (p90)
panels.description: 90th percentile latency for evidence collection from endpoints

panels.title: Platform Error Rate
panels.description: Server-side HTTP error rate — SLI for DFIR platform reliability

panels.title: Infra Headroom
panels.description: Minimum of CPU/Memory/FD headroom — capacity to handle incident surges

panels.title: Connected Clients Per Frontend & Cipher Cache
panels.description: Connected clients per frontend instance and cipher LRU cache size (unique clients served over time)

panels.title: Connection Transport Breakdown (TCP vs WebSocket)
panels.description: Percentage of connected clients using WebSocket — shows transport migration progress

panels.title: Connected vs Daily Active
panels.description: Real-time reachability — how many of today's active clients are connected right now

panels.title: Enrollment Rate (New Agents)
panels.description: Rate of new agent enrollments — spikes outside deployment windows may be anomalous

panels.title: Flow Completion Rate (Evidence Collection Throughput)
panels.description: Flows/sec completing — measures how fast forensic evidence can be gathered fleet-wide during an active hunt

panels.title: Evidence Collection Latency (p50 / p90 / p99)
panels.description: Time from dispatching collection to receiving data — directly impacts MTTR

panels.title: Time Since Last Hunt
panels.description: How long since the last proactive hunt was dispatched — stale hunting = reactive posture

panels.title: Frontend Saturation (Concurrency Wait p99)
panels.description: p99 time clients wait for a slot — high = server cannot handle surge. Directly impacts IR capacity.

panels.title: Data Collection Volume (Throughput)
panels.description: Bytes/sec and files/sec uploaded from endpoints — measures active evidence gathering

panels.title: Event Monitoring Per Client
panels.description: Normalized event rows per connected client per minute — drop indicates monitoring gaps

panels.title: Flow Cancellation Ratio
panels.description: Cancellations as % of completions — high ratio = wasted effort, poorly scoped hunts

panels.title: Total Rows Ingested Rate
panels.description: All data rows received from clients — aggregate telemetry throughput

panels.title: VQL Engine Load
panels.description: Active VQL throttlers and scope creation rate — indicates server-side query processing load

panels.title: Crypto Operations Rate
panels.description: RSA encrypt/decrypt/sign/verify operations — correlates with client communication volume

panels.title: Decryption Errors (Security Alert)
panels.description: Non-zero = possible MITM, rogue agents, or compromised clients. INVESTIGATE IMMEDIATELY.

panels.title: Load Shedding & Timeout Rejections
panels.description: Clients being rejected — indicates the platform cannot serve the fleet under current load

panels.title: Monitoring Coverage (Events/Client Trend)
panels.description: Normalized event rate per client — sustained drops mean some endpoints stopped sending detection telemetry

panels.title: CPU Headroom
panels.description: Available CPU capacity — low headroom means incidents could overwhelm the server

panels.title: Memory & FD Utilization
panels.description: Memory (RSS) and file descriptor usage over time

panels.title: Datastore & Filestore Latency (p90)
panels.description: p90 latency for reading/writing to the datastore and filestore — backend I/O bottleneck indicator

panels.title: Memcache Filestore Health
panels.description: Write buffer, LRU cache state, and delegate write rate — indicates flush backpressure

panels.title: Memcache Hit/Miss Ratio
panels.description: Cache effectiveness — high miss rate means excessive disk I/O

panels.title: Minion gRPC Connections
panels.description: Each minion must maintain gRPC connection to master — zero = data loss risk

panels.title: Replication Error Rate
panels.description: Failed PushRow RPCs — any sustained non-zero value means data is being lost between frontends

panels.title: Replication Latency p90
panels.description: Minion-to-master replication latency — high latency means evidence appears delayed on the master

panels.title: Platform Uptime (30d Rolling)
panels.description: Percentage of time the Velociraptor /metrics endpoint has been reachable — platform availability SLI

panels.title: Process Uptime
panels.description: Time since the Velociraptor server process started — restarts reset this counter

panels.title: Server Version
panels.description: Running build — version compliance evidence for auditors

panels.title: IOPs Level
panels.description: Current I/O operations — storage performance indicator

list.description: Total number of endpoints in your asset inventory (from CMDB). Used to calculate fleet coverage %.
list.label: Asset Inventory Count
list.name: asset_count

title: Velociraptor DFIR — Business Metrics & CISO Dashboard
